text:
Favorite moments:

(Start) Link: Hey Zelda, wake up! (Opens curtain and reveals himself) - Won!

0:04 NOW, PRESS BUTTON 2.

0:07 Multiple Links while crazy stuff happens: WOW! ThAnKs.

0:13 Link: (overlapping English and... Dutch? I dunno) HeY! yOu WaNt To FiGhT tHe FoRcEs Of EvIl iN kOrAdAi??

0:16 (Link throws the book of Koradai at himself. As the smoke clears, five Links appear and spin in a circle)
Links: What happened?...What happened?...(suddenly distorted sounds) What happened?...What happened?...(suddenly birds)

0:25 Link: I won.
Link: I WON.
Link: i WoN.
(Gong)

0:32 A very small Link: i'm going to fight glutko!
Sudden distorted Link as he grows larger: great! I'll grab my STUFF!

And 0:47 at the end.
